name: Roommate Agreement
description: A straightforward agreement among people sharing a residence, defining basic rules, rent splits, and responsibilities.
content:
ROOMMATE AGREEMENT

This Roommate Agreement (the "Agreement") is made on {{formatDate agreement_date}} by and among the individuals listed below (the "Roommates") regarding the shared occupancy of the premises located at {{property_address}}.

1. THE ROOMMATES

The following individuals are parties to this Agreement:

{{roommate_details}}

2. RENT AND SECURITY DEPOSIT

The total monthly rent for the premises is {{total_rent}}. The rent shall be divided among the Roommates as follows:

{{rent_breakdown}}

Rent must be paid no later than the {{rent_due_day}} day of each month. {{rent_payer}} will be responsible for collecting the rent and submitting it to the landlord.

The total security deposit paid to the landlord is {{total_deposit}}. The deposit was contributed, and will be returned, as follows:

{{deposit_breakdown}}

3. UTILITIES AND EXPENSES

The cost of shared utilities (Electricity, Water, Gas/Heating, Internet, and {{other_expenses}}) will be divided among the Roommates as follows: {{utility_split_method}}.

The following person(s) is/are responsible for managing and paying the utility bills on time: {{utility_payer}}.

4. COMMON AREAS AND CLEANING

All Roommates agree to keep the common areas (kitchen, living room, bathrooms) clean and tidy. The following cleaning schedule/rules will apply:

{{cleaning_rules}}

5. GUESTS AND OVERNIGHT VISITORS

The Roommates agree to the following rules regarding guests and overnight visitors:

{{guest_rules}}

6. QUIET HOURS

To respect each other's rest and privacy, quiet hours shall be observed between {{quiet_hours}}.

7. MOVING OUT

If a Roommate intends to move out before the lease expires, they must give at least {{notice_period}} days' notice to the other Roommates and the landlord. The departing roommate is responsible for their share of the rent and utilities until a suitable replacement (approved by the landlord and remaining roommates) is found, unless otherwise agreed.

8. ADDITIONAL AGREEMENTS

{{#if additional_rules}} 
{{additional_rules}}
{{else}}

None specified.

{{/if}}

By signing below, the Roommates acknowledge that they have read, understood, and agree to abide by the terms of this Agreement.

Signatures:

Print Name: ......................................................


Signature: _________________________


Print Name: ......................................................


Signature: _________________________

fields.name: roommate_details
fields.label: Roommate Details (Name, Phone)
fields.placeholder:
Person 1: Name, Phone
Person 2: Name, Phone

fields.name: rent_breakdown
fields.label: Rent Breakdown / Split
fields.placeholder: e.g., Divided equally. OR Person A pays $1100, Person B pays $900.

fields.name: rent_due_day
fields.label: Rent Due Day (Day of the month)

fields.name: rent_payer
fields.label: Who pays the landlord?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Everyone pays the landlord directly, OR Person A collects it.

fields.name: utility_split_method
fields.label: Utility Split Method
fields.placeholder: e.g., Split equally among all roommates

fields.name: utility_payer
fields.label: Who manages utility bills?
fields.placeholder: e.g., Person A pays electricity, Person B pays internet.

fields.name: cleaning_rules
fields.label: Cleaning Schedule & Rules
fields.placeholder: e.g., Alternating weekly chores, clean up immediately after cooking.

fields.name: guest_rules
fields.label: Guest & Overnight Rules
fields.placeholder: e.g., No overnight guests without prior notice. Max 3 nights a week.
